subject: fix: fix Version.__str__ and strictify parsing (#230)
one_line_summary: Version.__str__ dropped patch component (e.g. 4.0.0 became 4.0) and lenient parsing accepted invalid formats

subject: fix: change machine parameter type to int | str in Juju.exec (#223)
one_line_summary: Juju.exec machine parameter only accepted int, but LXD container IDs like '0/lxd/0' require str

subject: fix: support "app/leader" unit syntax for run and exec (#216)
one_line_summary: Using unit='app/leader' for run() or exec() crashed because Juju returns key as 'app/0' not 'app/leader'

subject: fix: allow revealed secrets without checksums (#204)
one_line_summary: Revealed secrets crashed with KeyError on Juju < 3.6 which lacks the 'checksum' field

subject: fix: add timeout to temp_model destroy-model to fix microk8s issues (#188)
one_line_summary: temp_model destroy-model hung indefinitely on microk8s, causing 6h CI timeouts

subject: fix: "juju model" doesn't use --model argument (#148)
one_line_summary: juju offer command was incorrectly passing --model flag which Juju CLI rejects

subject: fix: fix format of --bind argument for deploy (#132)
one_line_summary: Deploy --bind used comma-separated format but Juju CLI expects space-separated key=value pairs

subject: fix!: make "reset" an explicit arg for config/model_config (#125)
one_line_summary: Breaking API change: config reset via None values replaced with explicit 'reset' keyword argument

subject: fix!: in "offer", move endpoint to keyword-only arg instead of *args (#126)
one_line_summary: Breaking API change: offer() endpoint moved from positional *args to keyword-only argument for clarity

subject: fix!: return data rather than raising an exception on status-error (#120)
one_line_summary: StatusError exceptions on transient machine setup states crashed juju.wait() instead of allowing retry

subject: fix!: change all_* and any_* to take *apps instead of a list (#116)
one_line_summary: Breaking API change: all_active/any_error etc. changed from list parameter to *args for better ergonomics

subject: fix: correct polarity of WaitError message (#113)
one_line_summary: WaitError message said error function 'returned false' when it actually returned true

subject: fix: log wait status diffs under jubilant.wait logger name (#110)
one_line_summary: Wait status diff logs used top-level 'jubilant' logger making them hard to control independently

subject: fix: don't log "juju status" calls in Juju.wait() (#88)
one_line_summary: Every juju status poll in wait() was logged, creating excessive noise; also fixed blank-line glitches in diffs

subject: fix!: change remove_unit to use *args (#89)
one_line_summary: Breaking API change: remove_unit changed from string-or-iterable to *args for consistency with exec()

subject: fix: allow the library to work on Python 3.8+ (#80)
one_line_summary: Library required Python 3.12+ due to typing syntax and dataclass features; backported to 3.8+

subject: fix!: rename deploy param resource -> resources (#74)
one_line_summary: Breaking API change: deploy() parameter renamed from singular 'resource' to 'resources' for a dict param

subject: fix: add additional params to deploy() (#23)
one_line_summary: deploy() was missing many parameters like storage, constraints, trust, base, bind, and revision
